overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing a white-haired character riding a horse along a winding dirt path through lush green hills and wildflower meadows. The journey progresses from open vistas overlooking a distant castle city across a lake, through stone-walled country paths, to areas with wooden fences and rural workers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside trail overlooking waterfront castle

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady trot along a winding dirt path through grasslands covered in wildflowers

entered.detail: medieval castle and town visible across the lake in the distance
snow-capped mountains forming the horizon backdrop
tall deciduous tree with full green canopy
winding dirt trail with patches of grass
grassy slopes with red and purple wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright summer day with the character riding through open grasslands. A distant castle city sits across a lake to the left, framed by mountain ranges in the background. The path winds through moderate vegetation and scattered oak trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled country path with stone barriers

events.description: path becomes lined with rustic stone walls and denser tree cover

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it curves through more enclosed terrain with stone walls on either side

entered.detail: low rustic stone wall made of field stones
distinctive pointed rock spires on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more enclosed country path lined with rustic stone walls. Dense vegetation and tall cypress trees crowd the path as the distant castle view disappears behind the terrain. Distinctive rock spires become visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with wooden fencing and workers

events.description: path splits at a wooden signpost, wooden fences replace stone walls
two NPC workers become visible standing on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: riding past wooden fences and rural workers in a more populated countryside area

notable_agents.action: two workers standing by the path, one appears to be holding a farming tool

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with directional signs at the path junction
simple wooden post and rail fence lining the path
cluster of buildings visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The path splits at a wooden signpost where rustic stone walls give way to wooden fences. Two workers appear on the left side of the path, marking the first human presence in the clip. The landscape opens to reveal a distant village in the valley below as the ride continues through densely vegetated terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a vibrant countryside that shifts from wide-open vistas to enclosed rural paths and finally toward a distant village. It begins with a ride through bright summer grasslands, where a castle city is visible across a lake against a backdrop of mountain ranges. As the path winds forward, the open landscape narrows into a country lane lined with rustic stone walls and tall cypress trees, causing the distant city to vanish behind the terrain while rock spires emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts at a wooden signpost where the stone walls give way to wooden fences and the first signs of human presence appear in the form of two workers. Finally, the terrain opens up once more to reveal a village nestled in the valley below as the ride continues through dense vegetation.
